name: exocortex
description: Wearable exocortex agent runtime with first-class modalities, Expo and Electron hosts.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @exocortex/protocol && npm run build -w @exocortex/models && npm run build -w @exocortex/transports && npm run build -w @exocortex/peripherals && npm run build -w @exocortex/browser-session && npm run build -w @exocortex/session && npm run build -w @exocortex/electron && npm run build -w @exocortex/expo
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run test
